video:video.video:title: Renault Magnum Truck Hearse Video | Alternative Hearse Hire UK
video:video.video:description: Watch our Renault Magnum truck hearse in action. A bespoke alternative hearse available for funeral hire across the UK, offering a personal and memorable final journey.

video:video.video:title: ERF EC12 Hearse Video | Lorry Hearse Hire for UK Funerals
video:video.video:description: Video of our ERF EC12 hearse, a distinctive lorry hearse available for funeral directors and families seeking alternative hearse hire and specialist funeral transport in the UK.

video:video.video:title: Truck Hearse Funeral Transport Video | Bespoke Alternative Hearse UK
video:video.video:description: See our bespoke truck hearse providing unique funeral transport in the UK. Ideal for families wanting an alternative hearse that reflects a life connected with trucks, haulage or the road.

video:video.video:title: Alternative Hearse Hire Video | Custom Truck Hearse Service UK
video:video.video:description: Gallery video showing our custom truck hearse service for funerals across the UK. A professional alternative hearse hire option for a truly personal and respectful final journey.

video:video.video:title: Lorry Hearse UK Video | Renault Magnum and ERF EC12 Funeral Hire
video:video.video:description: Discover specialist lorry hearse hire in the UK, including Renault Magnum and ERF EC12 funeral vehicles. A unique alternative hearse service for families and funeral directors.
